reviews.review_description: Using the GO, does operate correctly. When I first downloaded it, all I had to do was restart the go and then it played fine. Now, nothing will fix it. Such a shame cause this was my 'go to' to introduce folks into VR. I imagine if I deleted everything on my go besides this it would work fine, but I'm not doing that. It deserves 5 stars but until someone gets this sorted out, it's gonna stay at 3.

developer_response.body: Hi cigarettelegs, thanks for letting us know about this. Could you please send QA@felixandpaul.com an email explaining the issue? We'll be able to help you from there. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Love it! Cannot believe how far VR has come!! Can’t wait for Jurassic blue 2!
I’ve downloaded two of these and the first one worked great, but for some reason this one is extremely choppy. Any idea on how to fix this?

developer_response.body: Hi Phyllip, thanks for letting us know about this issue. Our team is aware of the choppiness issue on some devices and we are investigating it. We are working to debug the problem.

reviews.review_title: Not very nice on oculus go
reviews.review_description: The quality of image ages is not nice for oculus go

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your input. We need a bit more information from you to see if we can fix this issue. Please email qa@felixandpaul.com, and detail what's happening when you open the app and the experience starts to play. Our quality assurance team will get back to you as soon as possible. We look forward to helping you soon!

reviews.review_description: Like so many other reviews have said, this app has choppy audio; essentially making it impossible to enjoy this experience for what it is. If it wasn’t for that, this would be a five star review. This was the app that I was going to use to show my friends and family my new oculus go and now I can’t. Developers pleeease fix this app so we can all enjoy this beautiful virtual reality experience.
the best Jurassic VR ever..just can't wait for the next part... I wish that video can be moved also to SD Card, it's very big size. thanks.

Would easily be 5 stars and really tried everything I could think of to fix the constant video/audio stutter but to no avail. Restarting the Go, redownloading the video, keeping the Go fully charged and plugged in still same constant video/audio stutter. Wish this was put up on YouTube as well because it does look amazing but unenjoyable. Which confuses me because I see reviews that are recent say it’s amazing I can only assume there is a fix I haven’t found or they aren’t watching it on the Go?
I want more
Just missing a bit of reality with the path left on the floor.
or some such. It complains that it needs an online service which is not available on my device. I am using the S7 in a Gear VR.
This is an incredible experience. The visuals are great and very lifelike.
Like others have said, the audio really spoils an otherwise beautiful experience

developer_response.body: Hi Andy, we have noticed a Go performance issue that occurs when the battery is under 20%. Could you try the experience again and ensure that the battery is over 20%? If the issue persists, please send an email to qa@felixandpaul.com and our team will be able to help you further.

reviews.review_description: Trouble from the start. Began with a blank screen. Eventually pressed home to escape it and the menus appeared. Right from the off the sound and video are incredibly choppy making it nearly impossible to watch. Shame because the graphics look beautiful, but as a video on the GO, it's not worth struggling with it.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for letting us know about this. Could you send an email to QA@felixandpaul.com explaining the issue and including your version, runtime version and OS version (Settings>About)? Our team will be able to help you from there.

reviews.review_description: I wish there was more then one video.. I love this an want to see more and have more options... PLEASE

Amazing the best VR ever I’d buy a whole hour of this if it were available. Blues right next to you 
The closeness and scale is amazing. Graphics are fantastic.
Mason
I was waiting for a game like this!!!! Thx so much

Just purchased the Oculus Go 32GB. This movie really struggles with playback and judders something horrid 😕. I’m hoping it’s something that can be fixed on my Oculus as others seem to have given it great reviews.
Graphics and sound is like I’m watching it on dial up?

developer_response.body: Hi Chapaas, thanks for letting us know about this issue. Our team is aware of the playback issue on some devices and we are investigating it. We are working to debug the problem.

reviews.review_description: It's alright, Cool to see some Dinosaurs but it's a little blurry and short. Unlike these 5 stars I'm giving an honest review.
